notes: v1.14.136 - Photoreal icon rollout STAGE A (final art re-ship, image bytes only). Replaced the contents of all 10 card icons (6 Ref: optics/hardware/cli/hwref/know/compass + 4 Work action: deploy-upload/scan-radar/handoff-link/issues-alert) with the FINAL true-256 photoreal production art from phantom-icons-PRODUCTION.zip. These supersede the v1.14.135 FIX_10 clean-cut set (the final art is ~5-10x larger / higher detail; reworked optics/handoff/compass are true-256 from larger sources). Filenames unchanged - all 10 already referenced in dct-ios.html and already in the sw.js precache array, so NO HTML, CSS, markup, or precache-array changes. Three-stamp lockstep bumped 135->136 so CACHE_VERSION busts the service worker and the new bytes reach the device. Gates: git status = exactly the 10 icons + 3 stamp files, node --check sw.js, version.json valid JSON, dct diff = stamp line only, sw.js diff = CACHE_VERSION line only (precache array intact), ?legacy=1 render byte-identical. This is the first ship of the multi-stage rollout (Stage B wires 33 NEW icons across pages, staged + device-verified per substage; Stage C adds fiber connectors). DEVICE-VERIFY (gloved, cold-aisle): close the tab, reopen, confirm SYS reads v1.14.136, then REF and Work both render the final photoreal icons; Airplane Mode + reload = all paint (precache proof); ?legacy=1 = 5-tab legacy unchanged.
